nav.desc.gate: Manage student exit & entry permits to the boarding school
nav.desc.behavior: Record violations, achievements, and student point accumulation
nav.desc.dorms: Room assignments, cleanliness checks, & Musyrif duties
nav.desc.health: Boarding school health post (Poskestren) & student medical records
nav.desc.counseling: Student counseling sessions, psychological guidance & mentoring
nav.desc.attendance: Daily class attendance via student QR card scan
nav.desc.schedule: Set up class schedules and teacher assignment
nav.desc.raport: Input UTS/UAS scores and print curriculum report cards
nav.desc.extracurricular: Manage clubs, talents, scouts, silat & archery
nav.desc.library: Borrow curriculum textbooks & classical Islamic texts
nav.desc.invoices: Manage monthly SPP invoices, meal fees, & development fees
nav.desc.saving: Student pocket money deposit system to prevent loss
nav.desc.payments: Recap of paid transactions, arrears, & guardian receipts
nav.desc.students: Central database of all active students in the system
nav.desc.teachers: Teacher accounts, Musyrif, and school staff data
nav.desc.classes: Class structure settings and dorm division
nav.desc.academic_years: Manage semesters and academic calendar periods
nav.desc.enrollment: Manage registration and new student admissions
nav.desc.inventory: Record school facilities, dorm & classroom inventory
nav.desc.news: Update announcements & latest info to the landing page
nav.desc.ai_insights: AI conversation audit and engine performance analysis
nav.desc.logs: Historical log of user activity and data changes
nav.desc.users: Manage access rights, roles, and user credentials
nav.desc.storage: Manage media, student photos, and system files
nav.desc.settings: Central panel for main application parameter settings
nav.desc.playground: Visual component guide and design documentation
